Ô Allah, enrichis-moi par la science, pare-moi de clémence, honore-moi par la piété et embellis-moi par la santé.
text.en: O Allah, take us by the forelock to lead us to righteousness and piety, and to deeds that You love and are pleased with. O Allah, Lord of Jibril, Mika'il, and Israfil, Originator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen, You will judge between Your servants concerning that over which they used to differ. Guide us, by Your permission, to the truth concerning that over which they differed, for indeed You guide whom You will to a straight path. O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your decree is executed upon me, and Your judgment upon me is just. I ask You by every name belonging to You, by which You have named Yourself, revealed in Your Book, taught to any of Your creation, or kept with Yourself in the knowledge of the unseen, to make the Qur'an the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the remover of my sorrow, and the dispeller of my anxiety. O Allah, place light in my heart, light in my hearing, light in my sight, light on my right, light on my left, light before me, light behind me, light above me, light below me, grant me light, and magnify my light. O Allah, enrich me with knowledge, adorn me with forbearance, honor me with piety, and beautify me with well-being.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمَ الخَائِفِينَ مِنْكَ، وَخَوفَ العَالِمِينَ بِكَ، وَيَقِينَ المُتَوَكِّلِينَ عَلَـيْكَ، وَتَوَكُّلَ المُوقِنِينَ بِكَ، وَإِنَابَةَ المُخْبِتِينَ إِلَيْكَ، وَإِخْبَاتَ المُنِيبينَ إِلَيْكَ، وَشُكْرَ الصَّابِرِينَ لَكَ، وَصَبْرَ الشَّاكِـرِينَ لَكَ، وَلَحَاقاً بِالأَحْيَاءِ المَرْزُوقِينَ عِنْدَكَ. اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي وَسَدِّدْنِي، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الهُدَى وَالسَّدَادَ. اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي، وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي. اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْماً. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لا يَنْفَعُ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka ʿilma ālkhaāiifiyna minka wakhawfa ālʿaālimiyna bika wayaqiyna ālmutawakilliyna ʿalayka watawakulla ālmuwqiniyna bika waiinaābaha ālmukhbitiyna iilayka waiikhbaāta ālmuniybyna iilayka washukra ālṣaāābiriyna laka waṣabra ālshaāākiriyna laka walaḥaāqāan biālaaḥyaāʾi ālmarzuwqiyna ʿindaka. āllahhuma āhdiniy wasadiddniy āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka ālhudaā waālsaddaāda. āllahhuma aalhimniy rushdiy waaaʿidhniy min shari nafsiy. āllahhuma ānfaʿniy bimaā ʿalammtaniy waʿalimmniy maā yanfaʿuniy wazidniy ʿilmāan. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka ʿilmāan naāfiʿāan waaaʿuwdhu bika min ʿilmin lā yanfaʿu.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je Te demande la science de ceux qui Te craignent, la crainte de ceux qui Te connaissent, la certitude de ceux qui s'en remettent à Toi, la confiance de ceux qui sont convaincus de Ton existence, le retour repentant de ceux qui s'humilient devant Toi, l'humilité de ceux qui reviennent vers Toi, la gratitude de ceux qui sont patients pour Toi, la patience de ceux qui Te sont reconnaissants, et de rejoindre les vivants qui sont pourvus de Ta subsistance auprès de Toi. Ô Allah, guide-moi et redresse-moi. Ô Allah, je Te demande la guidance et la rectitude. Ô Allah, inspire-moi ma conduite droite et protège-moi du mal de mon âme. Ô Allah, fais-moi profiter de ce que Tu m'as enseigné, enseigne-moi ce qui me profite et augmente ma science. Ô Allah, je Te demande une science utile, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre une science qui ne profite pas.
text.en: O Allah, I ask You for the knowledge of those who fear You, the fear of those who know You, the certainty of those who rely upon You, the trust of those who are convinced of You, the penitent return of those who humble themselves before You, the humility of those who turn back to You, the gratitude of those who are patient for You, the patience of those who are grateful to You, and to join the living who are provided for by You. O Allah, guide me and make me steadfast. O Allah, I ask You for guidance and rightness. O Allah, inspire me with my right course and protect me from the evil of my soul. O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge. O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, and I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْنِي وَاجْعَلْنِي هَادِياً مَهْدِيّاً. اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَعَلَيكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ، وَإِلَيكَ أَنَبْتُ، وَبِكَ خَاصَمْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّتِكَ، لا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَنْ تُضِلَّنِي، أَنْتَ الحَيُّ الَّذِي لا يَمُوتُ، وَالجِنُّ وَالإنْسُ يَمُوتُونَ. اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي لأَحْسَنِ الأَخْلاَقِ لا يَهْدِي لأَحْسَنِهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، وَاصْرِفْ عَنِّي سَيِّئَها لا يَصْرِفُ عَنِّي سَيِّئَهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ. اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا أَحْسَنْتَ خَلْقِي فَأَحْسِنْ خُلُقِي. اللَّهُمَّ فَالِقَ الحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى، وَمُخْرِجَ الحَيِّ مِنَ المَيِّتِ وَمُخْرِجَ المَيِّتِ مِنَ الحَيِّ، فَالِقَ الإِصْبَاحِ، وَجَاعِلَ اللَّيلِ سَكَناً، وَالشَّمْسَ والقَمَرَ حُسْبَاناً، يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ لَنَا النُّجُومَ لِنَهْتَدِيَ بِهَا فِي ظُلُمَاتِ الْبَرِّ وَالبَحْرِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma thabittniy waājʿalniy haādiyāan mahdiyāāan. āllahhuma laka aaslamtu wabika āmantu waʿalayka tawakalltu waiilayka aanabtu wabika khaāṣamtu aaʿuwdhu biʿizattika lā iilaha iilāa aanta aan tuḍilanniy aanta ālḥayu āladhdhiy lā yamuwtu waāljinu waālinsu yamuwtuwna. āllahhuma āhdiniy laaḥsani ālaakhlāaqi lā yahdiy laaḥsanihaā iilāa aanta waāṣrif ʿaniyy sayiiiahā lā yaṣrifu ʿaniyy sayiiiahaā iilāa aanta. āllahhuma kamaā aaḥsanta khalqiy faaaḥsin khuluqiy. āllahhuma faāliqa ālḥabi waālnawwaā wamukhrija ālḥayi mina ālmayitti wamukhrija ālmayitti mina ālḥayi faāliqa āliiṣbaāḥi wajaāʿila āllayyli sakanāan waālshammsa wālqamara ḥusbaānāan yaā man jaʿala lanaā ālnujjuwma linahtadiya bihaā fiy ẓulumaāti ālbari waālbaḥri.
text.fr: Ô Allah, affermis-moi et fais de moi un guide bien guidé. Ô Allah, c'est à Toi que je me suis soumis, en Toi que j'ai cru, en Toi que j'ai placé ma confiance, vers Toi que je me suis repenti, et par Toi que j'ai disputé (les ennemis). Je cherche refuge auprès de Ta puissance — il n'y a de divinité que Toi — contre le fait que Tu m'égares. Tu es le Vivant qui ne meurt jamais, tandis que les djinns et les humains meurent. Ô Allah, guide-moi vers les meilleurs caractères, car nul ne guide vers leurs meilleurs si ce n'est Toi, et détourne de moi leurs mauvais aspects, car nul ne les détourne de moi si ce n'est Toi. Ô Allah, comme Tu as bien formé mon apparence, rends beau mon caractère. Ô Toi qui fends la graine et le noyau, qui fais sortir le vivant du mort et le mort du vivant, qui fends l'aube, qui as fait de la nuit un repos, du soleil et de la lune une mesure, Toi qui as établi pour nous les étoiles pour nous guider dans les ténèbres de la terre et de la mer.
text.en: O Allah, make me firm and make me a rightly guided guide. O Allah, to You I have submitted, in You I have believed, upon You I have relied, to You I have turned in repentance, and by You I have argued (against enemies). I seek refuge in Your might — there is no deity except You — from letting me go astray. You are the Ever-Living who never dies, while jinn and humans die. O Allah, guide me to the best of characters, for none guides to the best of them except You, and turn away from me their evil aspects, for none turns them away from me except You. O Allah, just as You have perfected my creation, perfect my character. O Cleaver of the seed and the date-stone, O Bringer forth of the living from the dead and the dead from the living, O Cleaver of the dawn, O Maker of the night for rest, and the sun and the moon for reckoning, O You who have set the stars for us to guide us in the darkness of land and sea.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ جَلَّتْ قُدْرَتُكَ، وَتَعَالَتْ حِكْمَتُكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الحَمْدَ، لا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، المَنَّانُ، بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَات وَالأَرْضِ، ذُو الجَلالِ وَالإِكْرَامِ، يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ. اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنَا رِزْقًا يَزِيدُنَا لَكَ شُكْراً، وَإِلَيكَ فَاقَةً وَفَقْراً، وَبِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ غِنىً. اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ أَوْسَعَ رِزْقِكَ عَلَيَّ عِنْدَ كِبَرِ سِنِّي، وَانْقِطَاعِ عُمُرِي. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ فَإِنَّهُ لا يَمْلِكُهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ.
text.tr: āllahhuma jalatt qudratuka wataʿaālat ḥikmatuka watabaāraka āsmuka wataʿaālaā jadukka walā iilaha ghayruka. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka biaana laka ālḥamda lā iilaha iilāa aanta ālmanaāānu badiyʿu ālsammaāwaāt waālaarḍi dhuw āljalāli waāliikraāmi yaā ḥayu yaā qayuwwmu. āllahhuma ārzuqnaā rizqanā yaziydunaā laka shukrāan waiilayka faāqahan wafaqrāan wabika ʿamann siwaāka ghināan. āllahhuma ājʿal aawsaʿa rizqika ʿalaya ʿinda kibari siniyy waānqiṭaāʿi ʿumuriy. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka min faḍlika waraḥmatika faiinahhu lā yamlikuhaā iilāa aanta.
text.fr: Ô Allah, combien grande est Ta puissance, combien élevée est Ta sagesse, béni soit Ton nom, exaltée est Ta majesté, et il n'y a de divinité que Toi. Ô Allah, je Te demande, car à Toi appartient la louange, il n'y a de divinité que Toi, le Bienfaiteur Suprême, le Créateur sans modèle des cieux et de la terre, le Détenteur de la majesté et de l'honneur, Ô Vivant, Ô Eternel. Ô Allah, accorde-nous une subsistance qui augmente notre gratitude envers Toi, notre dénuement et notre pauvreté devant Toi, et notre richesse par Toi en dehors de quiconque. Ô Allah, fais que la plus large de Tes subsistances m'advienne au moment de ma vieillesse et de la fin de ma vie. Ô Allah, je Te demande de Ta grâce et de Ta miséricorde, car nul ne les possède en dehors de Toi.
text.en: O Allah, how great is Your power, how exalted is Your wisdom, blessed is Your name, high is Your majesty, and there is no deity besides You. O Allah, I ask You, for to You belongs all praise, there is no deity except You, the Bestower of favors, the Originator of the heavens and the earth, the Possessor of majesty and honor, O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining. O Allah, provide us with provision that increases our gratitude to You, our neediness and poverty before You, and our richness through You apart from anyone else. O Allah, make Your most ample provision come to me at the time of my old age and the end of my life. O Allah, I ask You of Your grace and mercy, for none possesses them except You.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ لا تَذَرْنِي فَرْداً وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ هَبْ لِيْ مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ قَنِّعْنِي بِمَا رَزَقْتَنِي، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيْهِ، وَاخْلُفْ عَلَيَّ كُلّ غَائِبَةٍ لِي مِنْكَ بِخَيرٍ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّة أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَاماً. اللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ بِنُجُومِهَا وَأَبْرَاجِهَا، وَالأَرْضُ بِسُهُولِـــهَا وَفِجَاجِهَا، وَالبِحَارُ بِأَحْيَائِهَا وَأَمْوَاجِهَا، وَالجِبَالُ بِقِمَمِهَا وَأَوْتَادِهَا، وَالأَشْجَارُ بِفُرُوعِهَا وَثِمَارِهَا، وَالسِّبَاعُ فِي فَلَوَاتِهَا، وَالطَّيْرُ فِي وَكَنَاتِهَا، يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الذَّرَّاتُ عَلَى صِغَرِهَا، وَالمَجَرَّاتُ عَلَى كِبَرِهَـا، يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ السَّبْعُ وَالأَرْضُ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ، وِإنْ مِنْ شَيءٍ إِلاَّ يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِه.
text.tr: āllahhuma rabi lā tadharniy fardāan waaanta khayru ālwaārithiyna. āllahhuma rabi hab liy mina ālṣaāāliḥiyna. āllahhuma qaniʿʿniy bimaā razaqtaniy wabaārik liy fiyhi waākhluf ʿalaya kul ghaāiibahin liy minka bikhayrin. āllahhuma rabannaā hab lanaā min aazwaājinaā wadhuriyyaāātinaā qurahh aaʿyunin waājʿalnaā lilmutaqqiyna iimaāmāan. āllahhuma yaā man tusabiḥḥu lahu ālsammaāwaātu binujuwmihaā waaabraājihaā waālaarḍu bisuhuwlihaā wafijaājihaā waālbiḥaāru biaaḥyaāiihaā waaamwaājihaā waāljibaālu biqimamihaā waaawtaādihaā waālaashjaāru bifuruwʿihaā wathimaārihaā waālsibbaāʿu fiy falawaātihaā waālṭayyru fiy wakanaātihaā yaā man tusabiḥḥu lahu āldharraāātu ʿalaā ṣigharihaā waālmajaraāātu ʿalaā kibarihaā yaā man tusabiḥḥu lahu ālsammaāwaātu ālsabbʿu waālaarḍu waman fiyhina wiin min shayʾin iilāa yusabiḥḥu biḥamdih.
text.fr: Ô Allah, Seigneur, ne me laisse pas seul, car Tu es le Meilleur des héritiers. Ô Allah, Seigneur, accorde-moi une progéniture vertueuse. Ô Allah, rends-moi satisfait de ce que Tu m'as accordé, bénis-le pour moi, et compense-moi par un bien pour tout bien qui m'a échappé de Ta part. Ô Allah, notre Seigneur, accorde-nous que nos épouses et nos descendants soient une source de joie pour nos yeux, et fais de nous des modèles pour les pieux. Ô Allah, Toi que glorifient les cieux par leurs étoiles et leurs constellations, la terre par ses plaines et ses vallées, les mers par leurs créatures et leurs vagues, les montagnes par leurs sommets et leurs racines, les arbres par leurs branches et leurs fruits, les fauves dans leurs déserts, les oiseaux dans leurs nids, Toi que glorifient les atomes dans leur petitesse et les galaxies dans leur immensité, Toi que glorifient les sept cieux et la terre et tout ce qui s'y trouve — il n'est rien qui ne célèbre Ta gloire et Ta louange.
text.en: O Allah, my Lord, do not leave me alone, for You are the Best of inheritors. O Allah, my Lord, grant me righteous offspring. O Allah, make me content with what You have provided me, bless it for me, and compensate me with good for every good thing I have missed from You. O Allah, our Lord, grant us that our spouses and our descendants be a comfort to our eyes, and make us leaders for the righteous. O Allah, You whom the heavens glorify with their stars and constellations, the earth with its plains and valleys, the seas with their creatures and waves, the mountains with their peaks and foundations, the trees with their branches and fruits, the beasts in their deserts, the birds in their nests, You whom the atoms glorify in their smallness and the galaxies in their vastness, You whom the seven heavens glorify, and the earth, and all that is in them — there is nothing that does not exalt Your glory and praise.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الأَرْضَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ العُلَى، يَا رَحْمَاناً عَلَى العَرْشِ اسْتَوَى، يَا مَنْ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَات وَمَا فِي الأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا، وَمَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَى، يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَ وَأَخْفَى، يَا مَنْ لَهُ الأَسْمَاءُ الحُسْنَى، يَا مَنْ مَعَ عِبَادِهِ يَسْمَعُ وَيَرَى، يَا مَنْ أَعْطَى كُلّ شَيءٍ خَلْقَهُ ثُمَّ هَدَى. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ البَادِئُ بِالإِحْسَانِ مِنْ قَبْلِ تَوَجُّهِ العَابِدِينَ، وَأَنْتَ البَادِئُ بِالعَطَايَا قَبْلَ طَلَبِ الطَّالِبِينَ وَأَنْتَ الوَهَّابُ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الجَنَّة وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ وَعَمَلٍ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مَنَ النَّارِ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ وَعَمَلٍ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ ابْنِ لِي عِنْدَكَ بَيْتاً فِي الجَنَّةِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رِضَاكَ وَالجَنَّةَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَالنَّارِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma yaā man khalaqa ālaarḍa waālsammaāwaāti ālʿulaā yaā raḥmaānāan ʿalaā ālʿarshi āstawaā yaā man lahu maā fiy ālsammaāwaāt wamaā fiy ālaarḍi wamaā baynahumaā wamaā taḥta āltharraā yaā man yaʿlamu ālsirra waaakhfaā yaā man lahu ālaasmaāʾu ālḥusnaā yaā man maʿa ʿibaādihi yasmaʿu wayaraā yaā man aaʿṭaā kul shayʾin khalqahu thuma hadaā. āllahhuma aanta ālbaādiiu biāliiḥsaāni min qabli tawajuhhi ālʿaābidiyna waaanta ālbaādiiu biālʿaṭaāyaā qabla ṭalabi ālṭaāālibiyna waaanta ālwahaāābu. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka āljanahh wamaā qarabba iilayhaā min qawlin waʿamalin waaaʿuwdhu bika mana ālnaāāri wamaā qarabba iilayhaā min qawlin waʿamalin. āllahhuma rabi ābni liy ʿindaka baytāan fiy āljanahhi. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka riḍaāka waāljanahha waaaʿuwdhu bika min sakhaṭika waālnaāāri.
text.fr: Ô Allah, Toi qui as créé la terre et les cieux sublimes, ô Tout Miséricordieux qui t'es établi sur le Trône, Toi à qui appartient tout ce qui est dans les cieux et sur la terre, ce qui est entre eux, et ce qui est sous la terre, Toi qui connais le secret et ce qui est plus caché encore, Toi qui possèdes les noms les plus beaux, Toi qui es avec Tes serviteurs, Tu entends et Tu vois, Toi qui as donné à chaque chose sa nature propre puis l'as guidée. Ô Allah, Tu es Celui qui initie la bienfaisance avant même que les adorateurs ne se tournent vers Toi, Tu es Celui qui initie les dons avant même que les demandeurs ne sollicitent, et Tu es le Grand Donateur. Ô Allah, je Te demande le Paradis et ce qui en rapproche en paroles et en actions, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre l'Enfer et ce qui en rapproche en paroles et en actions. Ô Allah, mon Seigneur, bâtis-moi auprès de Toi une demeure au Paradis. Ô Allah, je Te demande Ton agrément et le Paradis, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre Ton courroux et l'Enfer.
text.en: O Allah, You who created the earth and the lofty heavens, O Most Merciful who rose over the Throne, You to whom belongs all that is in the heavens and the earth, what is between them, and what is beneath the soil, You who knows the secret and what is even more hidden, You who has the most beautiful names, You who is with Your servants, You hear and You see, You who gave each thing its form then guided it. O Allah, You are the One who initiates goodness even before worshippers turn to You, You are the One who initiates gifts even before petitioners ask, and You are the Great Giver. O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and for words and deeds that bring one closer to it, and I seek refuge in You from Hellfire and from words and deeds that bring one closer to it. O Allah, my Lord, build for me with You a house in Paradise. O Allah, I ask You for Your pleasure and Paradise, and I seek refuge in You from Your wrath and the Fire.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَحْسِنْ عَاقِبَتِنَا فِي الأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا، وَأَجِرْنَا مِنْ خِزْيِ الدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ الآخِرَةِ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَاب جَهَنَّم إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَاماً. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَاب النَّارِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الجَنَّةَ، وَأسْتَجِيرُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلَى رُسِلِكَ وَلا تُخْزِنَا يَومَ القِيامَة إِنَّكَ لا تُخْلِفُ المِيعَادِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma aaḥsin ʿaāqibatinaā fiy ālaumuwri kulihhaā waaajirnaā min khizyi āldunnyaā waʿadhaābi ālākhirahi. āllahhuma rabannaā āṣrif ʿanaāā ʿadhaāb jahanamm iina ʿadhaābahaā kaāna gharaāmāan. āllahhuma rabannaā iinannaā āmanaāā faāghfir lanaā dhunuwbanaā waqinaā ʿadhaāb ālnaāāri. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka āljanahha waastajiyru bika mina ālnaāāri. āllahhuma rabannaā waātinaā maā waʿadtanaā ʿalaā rusilika walā tukhzinaā yawma ālqiyāmah iinakka lā tukhlifu ālmiyʿaādi.
text.fr: Ô Allah, accorde-nous une belle fin en toutes choses, et préserve-nous de l'humiliation de ce monde et du châtiment de l'au-delà. Ô Allah, notre Seigneur, détourne de nous le châtiment de la Géhenne, car son châtiment est permanent. Ô Allah, notre Seigneur, nous avons cru, pardonne-nous nos péchés et préserve-nous du châtiment du Feu. Ô Allah, je Te demande le Paradis, et j'implore Ta protection contre l'Enfer. Ô Allah, notre Seigneur, accorde-nous ce que Tu nous as promis par Tes messagers, et ne nous couvre pas d'opprobre au Jour de la Résurrection, car Tu ne manques pas à Ta promesse.
text.en: O Allah, grant us a good end in all matters, and protect us from the disgrace of this world and the punishment of the Hereafter. O Allah, our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell, for its punishment is enduring. O Allah, our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us our sins and protect us from the punishment of the Fire. O Allah, I ask You for Paradise, and I seek Your protection from the Fire. O Allah, our Lord, grant us what You have promised us through Your messengers, and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection, for You never break Your promise.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ حَاسِبْنِي حِسَاباً يَسِيراً. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ نُشْرِكَ بِكَ شَيْئاً نَعْلَمُهُ، وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لا نَعْلَمُهُ. اللَّهُمَّ إنِّيْ أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَهْدِ البَلاء، ودَرَكِ الشّــَقَاء، وســوء القضاء، وشَمَاتَة الأعْدَاء، يَا سَمِيْع الدُّعَاء. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ المَحْيَا وَالمَمَـاتِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ المَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ المَأْثَمِ وَالمَغْرَمِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ النَّارِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَفِتْنَةِ القَبْرِ، وَعَذَابِ القَبْرِ، وَشَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الغِنَى، وَشَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الفَقْرِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ المَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma ḥaāsibniy ḥisaābāan yasiyrāan. āllahhuma iinaāā naʿuwdhu bika aan nushrika bika shayiāan naʿlamuhu wanastaghfiruka limaā lā naʿlamuhu. āllahhuma iniyy aʿuwdhu bika min jahdi ālbalāʾ wdaraki ālshaqqaāʾ wswʾ ālqḍāʾ wshamaātah ālaʿdaāʾ yaā samiyʿ ālduʿʿaāʾ. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min ʿadhaābi jahanamma wamin ʿadhaābi ālqabri wamin fitnahi ālmaḥyaā waālmamaāti wamin fitnahi ālmasiyḥi āldajjaāāli waaaʿuwdhu bika mina ālmaathami waālmaghrami. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min fitnahi ālnaāāri waʿadhaābi ālnaāāri wafitnahi ālqabri waʿadhaābi ālqabri washari fitnahi ālghinaā washari fitnahi ālfaqri āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min shari fitnahi ālmasiyḥi āldajjaāāli.
text.fr: Ô Allah, juge-moi avec indulgence. Ô Allah, nous cherchons refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait de T'associer sciemment quoi que ce soit, et nous Te demandons pardon pour ce que nous ignorons. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la rigueur de l'épreuve, l'atteinte du malheur, la mauvaise destinée, et la joie des ennemis, ô Toi qui entends les invocations. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le châtiment de la Géhenne, contre le châtiment de la tombe, contre la tentation de la vie et de la mort, contre la tentation du Faux Messie, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le péché et l'excès de dettes. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la tentation du Feu et son châtiment, contre la tentation de la tombe et son châtiment, contre le mal de la tentation de la richesse, contre le mal de la tentation de la pauvreté. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de la tentation du Faux Messie.
text.en: O Allah, call me to account with an easy accounting. O Allah, we seek refuge in You from knowingly associating anything with You, and we ask Your forgiveness for what we do unknowingly. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the hardship of trial, the reach of misery, the evil of destiny, and the gloating of enemies, O Hearer of supplications. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, from the trial of the False Messiah, and I seek refuge in You from sin and overwhelming debt. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the trial of the Fire and its punishment, from the trial of the grave and its punishment, from the evil of the trial of wealth, from the evil of the trial of poverty. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْ قَلْبِي بِمَاءِ الثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ ، وَنَقِّ قَلْبِيَ مِنْ الخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ ، وَبَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ المَشْرِقِ وَالمَغْرِبِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الكَسَلِ وَالمَأْثَمِ وَالمَغْرَمِ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ جِبْرَائِيلَ ، وَمِيكَائِيلَ ، وَرَبِّ إِسْرَافِيلَ ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ حَرِّ النَّارِ وَمِنْ عَذَابِ القَبْرِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَارِ السُّوءِ فِي دَارِ المُقَامَةِ ، فَإِنَّ جَارَ البَادِيَةِ يَتَحَوَّلُ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ العَجْزِ وَالكَسَلِ ، وَالجُبْنِ وَالبُخْلِ ، وَالهَرَمِ وَالقَسْوَةِ ، وَالغَفْلَةِ وَالعَيْلَةِ وَالذِّلَّةِ ، وَالمَسْكَنَةِ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الفَقْرِ وَالكُفْرِ ، وَالفُسُوقِ وَالشِّقَاقِ وَالنِّفَاقِ، وَالسُّمْعَةِ وَالرِّيَاءِ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الصَّمَمِ وَالبَكَمِ ، وَالجُنُونِ ، وَالجِذَامِ ، وَالبَرَصِ ، وَسَيِّئِ الأَسْقَامِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma āghsil qalbiy bimaāʾi ālthallji waālbaradi wanaqi qalbiya min ālkhaṭaāyaā kamaā naqayyta ālthawwba ālaabyaḍa mina āldannasi wabaāʿid bayniy wabyna khaṭaāyaāya kamaā baāʿadta bayna ālmashriqi waālmaghribi. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina ālkasali waālmaathami waālmaghrami. āllahhuma rabi jibraāiiyla wamiykaāiiyla warabi iisraāfiyla aaʿuwdhu bika min ḥari ālnaāāri wamin ʿadhaābi ālqabri. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min jaāri ālsuwwʾi fiy daāri ālmuqaāmahi faiina jaāra ālbaādiyahi yataḥawallu. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina ālʿajzi waālkasali waāljubni waālbukhli waālharami waālqaswahi waālghaflahi waālʿaylahi waāldhillahhi waālmaskanahi waaaʿuwdhu bika mina ālfaqri waālkufri waālfusuwqi waālshiqqaāqi waālniffaāqi waālsummʿahi waālriyyaāʾi waaaʿuwdhu bika mina ālṣammami waālbakami waāljunuwni waāljidhaāmi waālbaraṣi wasayiiii ālaasqaāmi.
text.fr: Ô Allah, lave mon cœur avec l'eau de la neige et de la grêle, purifie mon cœur des péchés comme Tu purifies un vêtement blanc de la souillure, et éloigne-moi de mes péchés comme Tu as éloigné l'Orient de l'Occident. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la paresse, le péché et la dette. Ô Allah, Seigneur de Gabriel, Michel et Israfil, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la chaleur du Feu et contre le châtiment de la tombe. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre un mauvais voisin dans la demeure permanente, car le voisin du désert (en voyage) peut changer. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre l'incapacité et la paresse, contre la lâcheté et l'avarice, contre la sénilité et la dureté du cœur, contre l'insouciance, la pauvreté (besoin), l'humiliation et la misère. Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la pauvreté et la mécréance, contre la perversité, la discorde et l'hypocrisie, contre l'ostentation et l'hypocrisie (dans les actes). Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la surdité, le mutisme, la folie, la lèpre, la teigne, et contre les pires maladies.
text.en: O Allah, wash my heart with the water of snow and hail, purify my heart from sins as You purify a white garment from dirt, and distance me from my sins as You have distanced the East from the West. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from laziness, sin, and debt. O Allah, Lord of Jibril, Mika'il, and Israfil, I seek refuge in You from the heat of the Fire and from the punishment of the grave. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from a bad neighbor in the permanent abode, for the neighbor in the desert (while traveling) may change. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from senility and hardness of heart, from heedlessness, neediness, humiliation, and poverty. I seek refuge in You from poverty and disbelief, from wickedness, discord, and hypocrisy, from showmanship and ostentation. I seek refuge in You from deafness, muteness, madness, leprosy, vitiligo, and from the worst of diseases.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ العَجْزِ وَالكَسَلِ ، وَالجُبْنِ ، وَالبُخْلِ ، وَالهَرَمِ ، وَعَذَابِ القَبْرِ، اللَّهُمَّ آتِ نَفْسِي تَقْوَاهَا ، وَزَكِّهَا أَنْتَ خَيْرُ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا ، أَنْتَ وَلِيُّهَا وَمَوْلاَهَا. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لا يَنْفَعُ ، وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لا يَخْشَعُ ، وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لا تَشْبَعُ ، وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لا يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُنْكَرَاتِ الأَخْلاَقِ وَالأَعْمَالِ وَالأَهْوَاءِ وَالأَدْوَاءِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ تُحَسِّنَ فِي لَوَائِحِ العُيُونِ عَلانِيَتِي ، وَتُقَبِّحَ فِي خَفِيَّاتِ العُيُونِ سَرِيرَتِي ، اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا أَسَأْتُ وَأَحْسَنْتَ إِلَيَّ ، فَإِذَا عُدْتُ فُعُدْ عَلَيَّ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ سَمْـعِي ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ بَصَــرِي ، وَمِنْ شَــرِّ لِسَـانِيْ ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ قَـلْـبِي ، ومن شـرِّ مَنِيِّي.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina ālʿajzi waālkasali waāljubni waālbukhli waālharami waʿadhaābi ālqabri āllahhuma āti nafsiy taqwaāhaā wazakihhaā aanta khayru man zakaāāhaā aanta waliyuhhaā wamawlāahaā. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min ʿilmin lā yanfaʿu wamin qalbin lā yakhshaʿu wamin nafsin lā tashbaʿu wamin daʿwahin lā yustajaābu lahaā. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min munkaraāti ālaakhlāaqi waālaaʿmaāli waālaahwaāʾi waālaadwaāʾi. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika aan tuḥasinna fiy lawaāiiḥi ālʿuyuwni ʿalāniyatiy watuqabiḥḥa fiy khafiyaāāti ālʿuyuwni sariyratiy āllahhuma kamaā aasaatu waaaḥsanta iilaya faiidhaā ʿudtu fuʿud ʿalaya. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min shari samʿiy wamin shari baṣariy wamin shari lisaāniy wamin shari qalbiy wmn shri maniyiyy.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre l'incapacité, la paresse, la lâcheté, l'avarice, la sénilité et le châtiment de la tombe. Ô Allah, accorde à mon âme sa piété et purifie-la, car Tu es le Meilleur de ceux qui purifient, Tu es son Protecteur et son Maître. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre une science qui ne profite pas, contre un cœur qui ne s'humilie pas, contre une âme qui ne se rassasie pas, et contre une invocation qui n'est pas exaucée. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la laideur des caractères, des actions, des passions et des maux. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait que Tu embellisses mon apparence aux regards et que Tu enlaidisses mon for intérieur dans le secret des cœurs. Ô Allah, de même que j'ai mal agi et que Tu as été Bon envers moi, si je récidive, reviens encore sur moi par Ta bonté. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de mon ouïe, contre le mal de ma vue, contre le mal de ma langue, contre le mal de mon cœur, et contre le mal de mon sperme (ma semence).
text.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from incapacity, laziness, cowardice, miserliness, senility, and the punishment of the grave. O Allah, grant my soul its piety and purify it, for You are the Best of those who purify, You are its Guardian and Master. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit, from a heart that does not humble itself, from a soul that is never satisfied, and from a supplication that is not answered. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the wickedness of character, deeds, desires, and ailments. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from You making my outward appearance good in the sight of people, while making my inner self evil in their hidden perception. O Allah, just as I have done wrong and You have been good to me, if I return (to sin), then return (to forgiveness) upon me. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my hearing, from the evil of my sight, from the evil of my tongue, from the evil of my heart, and from the evil of my semen (my offspring).

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَقُولَ زُوراً ، أَوْ أَغْشَى فُجُوراً ، أَوْ أَكُونَ بِكَ مَغْرُوراً. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشِّقَاقِ وَالنِّفَاقِ ، وَسُوءِ الأخْلاقِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ ، وَبِكَ مِنْكَ ، لا أُحْصِى ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الأَرْضِ ، وَرَبَّ العَرْشِ العَظِيمِ ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلّ شَيءٍ ، فَالِقَ الحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى ، وَمُنَزِّلَ التَّوْرَاةَ وَالإنْجِيلَ وَالفُرْقَانَ ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلّ شَيءٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهِ ، اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الأَوَّلُ فَلَيسَ قَبْلَكَ شَيءٌ ، وَأَنْتَ الآخِرُ فَلَيسَ بَعْدَكَ شَيءٌ ، وَأَنْتَ الظَّاهِرُ فَلَيسَ فَوْقَكَ شَيءٌ ، اقْضِ عَنَّا الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ الفَقْرِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ ، وَغَلَبَةِ العَدُوِّ ، وَشَمَاتَةِ الأَعْدَاءِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika aan aaquwla zuwrāan aaw aaghshaā fujuwrāan aaw aakuwna bika maghruwrāan. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina ālshiqqaāqi waālniffaāqi wasuwʾi ālakhlāqi. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu biriḍaāka min sakhaṭika wabimuʿaāfaātika min ʿuquwbatika wabika minka lā auḥṣiā thanaāʾan ʿalayka aanta kamaā aathnayta ʿalaā nafsika. āllahhuma raba ālsammaāwaāti ālsabbʿi waraba ālaarḍi waraba ālʿarshi ālʿaẓiymi rabannaā waraba kul shayʾin faāliqa ālḥabi waālnawwaā wamunazilla āltawwraāha waālinjiyla waālfurqaāna aaʿuwdhu bika min shari kul shayʾin aanta ākhidhun binaāṣiyatihi āllahhuma aanta ālaawallu falaysa qablaka shayʾun waaanta ālākhiru falaysa baʿdaka shayʾun waaanta ālẓaāāhiru falaysa fawqaka shayʾun āqḍi ʿanaāā āldayyna waaaghninaā mina ālfaqri. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min ghalabahi āldayyni waghalabahi ālʿaduwi washamaātahi ālaaʿdaāʾi.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait de dire un mensonge, de commettre un acte obscène, ou d'être trompé (par une fausse sécurité) à Ton égard. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la discorde, l'hypocrisie et les mauvais caractères. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Ton agrément contre Ton courroux, auprès de Ton pardon contre Ton châtiment, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre Toi-même. Je ne saurais Te louer comme Tu le mérites ; Tu es tel que Tu T'es loué Toi-même. Ô Allah, Seigneur des sept cieux et Seigneur de la terre, Seigneur du Trône immense, notre Seigneur et Seigneur de toute chose, Toi qui fends la graine et le noyau, qui as fait descendre la Thora, l'Évangile et le Discernement (le Coran), je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de toute créature que Tu tiens par le toupet. Ô Allah, Tu es le Premier, rien n'existe avant Toi ; Tu es le Dernier, rien n'existe après Toi ; Tu es l'Apparent, rien n'est au-dessus de Toi. Acquitte-nous de nos dettes et enrichis-nous pour nous préserver de la pauvreté. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la domination de la dette, contre la domination de l'ennemi et contre la joie des ennemis.
text.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from speaking falsely, committing immorality, or being deluded (by false security) regarding You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from discord, hypocrisy, and bad manners. O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your wrath, and in Your pardon from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You. I cannot enumerate Your praise; You are as You have praised Yourself. O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the Great Throne, our Lord and Lord of all things, Cleaver of the seed and the date-stone, Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Criterion (the Qur'an), I seek refuge in You from the evil of every creature You hold by the forelock. O Allah, You are the First, nothing is before You; You are the Last, nothing is after You; You are the Manifest, nothing is above You. Settle our debts for us and enrich us against poverty. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from being overwhelmed by debt, from being overwhelmed by the enemy, and from the gloating of enemies.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الفَقْرِ وَالقِلَّةِ وَالذِّلَّةِ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الغِنَى ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الفَقْرِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ ، وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ ، وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ ، وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ يَوْمِ السُّوءِ ، وَمِنْ لَيْلَةِ السُّوءِ ، وَمِنْ سَاعَةِ السُّوءِ ، وَمِنْ صَاحِبِ السُّوءِ ، وَمِنْ جَارِ السُّوءِ ، فِي دَارِ المُقَامَةِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ قَلْبٍ لا يَخْشَعُ ، وَمِنْ دُعَاءٍ لا يُسْمَعُ ، وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لا تَشْبَعُ ، وَمِنْ عِلْمٍ لا يَنْفَعُ ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَؤُلاَءِ الأَرْبَعِ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina ālfaqri waālqilahhi waāldhillahhi waaaʿuwdhu bika min aan aaẓlima aaw auẓlama. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min shari fitnahi ālghinaā wamin shari fitnahi ālfaqri. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min zawaāli niʿmatika wataḥawulli ʿaāfiyatika wafujaāʾahi niqmatika wajamiyʿi sakhaṭika. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min yawmi ālsuwwʾi wamin laylahi ālsuwwʾi wamin saāʿahi ālsuwwʾi wamin ṣaāḥibi ālsuwwʾi wamin jaāri ālsuwwʾi fiy daāri ālmuqaāmahi. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min qalbin lā yakhshaʿu wamin duʿaāʾin lā yusmaʿu wamin nafsin lā tashbaʿu wamin ʿilmin lā yanfaʿu aaʿuwdhu bika min hauulāaʾi ālaarbaʿi.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la pauvreté, le dénuement et l'humiliation ; et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait d'opprimer ou d'être opprimé. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de la tentation de la richesse et contre le mal de la tentation de la pauvreté. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la disparition de Tes bienfaits, contre le changement de Ta protection, contre la soudaineté de Ta punition, et contre toute Ta colère. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre un mauvais jour, une mauvaise nuit, une mauvaise heure, un mauvais compagnon, et un mauvais voisin dans la demeure permanente. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre un cœur qui ne s'humilie pas, contre une invocation qui n'est pas entendue (exaucée), contre une âme qui ne se rassasie pas, et contre une science qui ne profite pas. Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre ces quatre choses.
text.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty, scarcity, and humiliation; and I seek refuge in You from wronging others or being wronged. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of the trial of wealth and from the evil of the trial of poverty. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the withdrawal of Your favor, from the change of Your protection, from the suddenness of Your punishment, and from all Your wrath. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from an evil day, an evil night, an evil hour, an evil companion, and an evil neighbor in the permanent abode. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from a heart that does not humble itself, from a supplication that is not heard (answered), from a soul that is never satisfied, and from knowledge that does not benefit. I seek refuge in You from these four.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ التَّـرَدِّي ، وَالهَدْمِ ، وَالغَرَقِ ، وَالحَرْقِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ يَتَخَبَّطَنِي الشَّيطَانُ عِنْدَ المَوْتِ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أَمُوتَ فِي سَبِيلِكَ مُدْبِراً ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَمُوتَ لَدِيغاً. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ ربِّ أَنْ يَحْضُرُونَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ الأَشْرَارِ ، وَمِنْ كَيْدِ الفُجَّارِ ، ومِنْ طَوَارِقِ اللَّيْلِ والنَّهَارِ إلاَّ طَارِقَاً يَطْرُقُ بِخَيْرٍ يَا رَحْمَنْ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَعْيُنِ العَائِنِينَ ، وَمِنْ سِحْرِ السَّاحِرِينَ ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي شَرِّ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الجُوعِ ، فَإِنَّهُ بِئْسَ الضَّجِيعُ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ الخِيَانَةِ ، فَإنَّهَا بِئْسَتِ البِطَانَةُ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina āltarradiyy waālhadmi waālgharaqi waālḥarqi waaaʿuwdhu bika aan yatakhabaṭṭaniy ālshayyṭaānu ʿinda ālmawti waaaʿuwdhu bika min aan aamuwta fiy sabiylika mudbirāan waaaʿuwdhu bika aan aamuwta ladiyghāan. āllahhuma rabi aaʿuwdhu bika min hamazaāti ālshayyaāṭiyni waaaʿuwdhu bika rbi aan yaḥḍuruwna. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min shari ālaashraāri wamin kaydi ālfujaāāri wmin ṭawaāriqi āllayyli wālnahhaāri ilāa ṭaāriqaāan yaṭruqu bikhayrin yaā raḥman. āllahhuma rabi aaʿuwdhu bika min aaʿyuni ālʿaāiiniyna wamin siḥri ālsaāāḥiriyna wamin shari kuli dhiy shari. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika mina āljuwʿi faiinahhu biisa ālḍajjiyʿu waaaʿuwdhu bika min ālkhiyaānahi fainahhaā biisati ālbiṭaānahu.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la chute (du haut d'une montagne ou dans un puits), l'effondrement (sous un mur), la noyade et le feu. Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait que Satan me trouble au moment de la mort. Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait de mourir en fuyant sur Ton chemin, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait de mourir par piqûre (de bête venimeuse). Ô Allah, mon Seigneur, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre les incitations des diables, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi, Seigneur, contre leur présence. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal des méchants, contre la ruse des pervers, et contre les calamités soudaines de la nuit et du jour, sauf une calamité qui apporte le bien, ô Tout Miséricordieux. Ô Allah, mon Seigneur, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre les yeux des envieux, contre la sorcellerie des sorciers, et contre le mal de tout être malfaisant. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la faim, car quel mauvais compagnon de lit elle est ! Et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre la trahison, car quelle mauvaise confidente elle est !
text.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from falling (from a height or into a pit), from collapse (under a wall), from drowning, and from burning. I seek refuge in You from Satan troubling me at the time of death. I seek refuge in You from dying while fleeing on Your path, and I seek refuge in You from dying from a sting (of a venomous creature). O Allah, my Lord, I seek refuge in You from the whisperings of the devils, and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, from their presence. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of the wicked, from the plot of the immoral, and from sudden calamities of night and day, except a calamity that brings good, O Most Merciful. O Allah, my Lord, I seek refuge in You from the eyes of the envious, from the magic of the sorcerers, and from the evil of every evil-doer. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from hunger, for it is an evil bedfellow! And I seek refuge in You from treachery, for it is an evil confidant!

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عُقُوقِ الأَبْنَاءِ ، وَمِنْ قَطِيعَةِ الأَقْرِبَاءِ ، وَمِنْ جَفْوَةِ الأَحْيَاءِ ، وَمِنْ تَغَيُّرِ الأَصْدِقَاءِ ، وَمِنْ شَمَاتَةِ الأَعْدَاءِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أنْ أَزِلَّ أَوْ أُزَلَّ ، أَوْ أَضِلَّ أَوْ أُضَلَّ ، أَوْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ ، أَوْ أَجْهَلَ أَوْ يُجْهَلَ عَلَيَّ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْتَعِينُكَ وَنَسْتَهْدِيكَ، وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَنَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ وَنُؤمِنُ بِكَ ، وَنَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَيْكَ ، وَنُثْنِي عَلَيْكَ الخَيْرَ كُلّهُ ، نَشْكُرُكَ وَلا نَكْفُرُكَ ، وَنَخْلَعُ وَنَتْرُكُ مَنْ يَفْجُرُكَ ، اللَّهُمَّ إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ ، وَلَكَ نُصَلِّي وَنَسْجُدُ ، وَإِلَيكَ نَسْعَى وَنَحْفِدُ ، نَرْجُو رَحْمَتَكَ ، وَنَخْشَى عَذَابَكَ ، إِنَّ عَذَابَكَ الجِدَّ بِالكُفَّارِ مُلْحِقٌ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا أَعِزَّنَا بِالإِسْلامِ ، وَأَعِزَّ بِنَا الإسْلامَ ، اللَّهُمَّ أَعْلِ بِنَا كَلِمَةَ الإسْلاَمِ ، وَارْفَعْ بِنَا رَايَةَ القُرْآنِ. اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الكِتَابِ ، وَمُجْرِيَ السَّحَابِ وَهَازِمَ الأَحْزَابِ ، عَالِمَ الغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الأَعْظَمِ الَّذِي إِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ أَجَبْتَ وَإِذَا سُئِلْتَ بِهِ أَعْطَيْتَ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min ʿuquwqi ālaabnaāʾi wamin qaṭiyʿahi ālaaqribaāʾi wamin jafwahi ālaaḥyaāʾi wamin taghayurri ālaaṣdiqaāʾi wamin shamaātahi ālaaʿdaāʾi. āllahhuma iiniyy aaʿuwdhu bika min an aazila aaw auzala aaw aaḍila aaw auḍala aaw aaẓlima aaw auẓlama aaw aajhala aaw yujhala ʿalaya. āllahhuma iinaāā nastaʿiynuka wanastahdiyka wanastaghfiruka wanatuwbu iilayka wanuuminu bika wanatawakallu ʿalayka wanuthniy ʿalayka ālkhayra kulhhu nashkuruka walā nakfuruka wanakhlaʿu wanatruku man yafjuruka āllahhuma iiyaāāka naʿbudu walaka nuṣaliyy wanasjudu waiilayka nasʿaā wanaḥfidu narjuw raḥmataka wanakhshaā ʿadhaābaka iina ʿadhaābaka āljida biālkufaāāri mulḥiqun. āllahhuma rabannaā aaʿizannaā biāliislāmi waaaʿiza binaā ālislāma āllahhuma aaʿli binaā kalimaha ālislāami waārfaʿ binaā raāyaha ālqurāni. āllahhuma munzila ālkitaābi wamujriya ālsaḥḥaābi wahaāzima ālaaḥzaābi ʿaālima ālghaybi waālshahhaādahi aasaaluka biāsmika ālaaʿẓami āladhdhiy iidhaā duʿiyta bihi aajabta waiidhaā suiilta bihi aaʿṭayta.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre l'ingratitude des enfants, la rupture des liens avec les proches, la froideur des vivants, le changement des amis, et la joie des ennemis. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le fait de glisser (dans l'erreur) ou d'être poussé à glisser, de m'égarer ou d'être égaré, d'opprimer ou d'être opprimé, d'agir avec ignorance ou que l'on agisse avec ignorance envers moi. Ô Allah, nous implorons Ton aide, nous Te demandons la guidance, nous implorons Ton pardon, nous nous repentons à Toi, nous croyons en Toi, nous plaçons notre confiance en Toi, nous faisons Ton éloge en tout bien, nous Te remercions et ne sommes pas ingrats envers Toi, nous désavouons et abandonnons ceux qui Te désobéissent. Ô Allah, c'est Toi seul que nous adorons, c'est pour Toi que nous prions et nous prosternons, c'est vers Toi que nous nous efforçons et nous hâtons (vers l'obéissance). Nous espérons Ta miséricorde et redoutons Ton châtiment, car Ton châtiment sévère atteindra sûrement les mécréants. Ô Allah, notre Seigneur, fais que nous soyons puissants par l'Islam, et rends l'Islam puissant grâce à nous. Ô Allah, élève par nous la parole de l'Islam, et hisse par nous l'étendard du Coran. Ô Allah, Toi qui as fait descendre le Livre, qui fais courir les nuages, qui as vaincu les coalisés, Toi qui connais l'invisible et le visible, je Te demande par Ton Nom Suprême, celui par lequel si Tu es invoqué, Tu réponds, et si Tu es imploré, Tu accordes.
text.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the disobedience of children, the severing of ties with relatives, the coldness of the living, the change of friends, and the gloating of enemies. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from slipping (into error) or being made to slip, from going astray or being led astray, from wronging others or being wronged, from acting ignorantly or being treated ignorantly. O Allah, we seek Your help, we ask You for guidance, we seek Your forgiveness, we repent to You, we believe in You, we put our trust in You, we praise You with all goodness, we thank You and are not ungrateful to You, we disavow and forsake those who disobey You. O Allah, You alone we worship, to You we pray and prostrate, to You we strive and hasten (in obedience). We hope for Your mercy and fear Your punishment, for Your severe punishment will surely overtake the disbelievers. O Allah, our Lord, make us powerful through Islam, and make Islam powerful through us. O Allah, raise the word of Islam through us, and lift the banner of the Qur'an through us. O Allah, Revealer of the Book, Mover of the clouds, Defeater of the confederates, Knower of the unseen and the seen, I ask You by Your Greatest Name, the one by which if You are called upon, You answer, and if You are asked, You give.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ يَاحَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ ، يَاحَيُّ يَاقَيُّومُ ، يَاحَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ ، اللَّهُمَّ أَظِلَّنِي فِيْ ظِلِّ عَرْشِكَ يَوْمَ لا ظِلَّ إِلاَّ ظِلُّكَ. اللَّهُمَّ أَظْهِرْ دِينَكَ عَلَى الدِّينِ كُلِّهُ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ المُشْرِكُونَ. اللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ يُجِيبُ المُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ ، وَيَكْشِفُ السُّوءَ ، اكْشِفِ السُّوءَ عَنْ إِخْوَانِنَا الأُسَارَى وَالمَسْجُونِينَ وَالمُعْتَقَلِينَ ، اللَّهُمَّ افْكُكْ بِقُوَّتِكَ أَسْرَهُمْ ، وَاجْبُرْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ كَسْرَهُمْ ، وَتَوَلَّ بِعِنَايَتِكَ أَمْرَهُمْ ، وَرُدَّهُمْ إِلَى أَهْلِيهِمْ سَالِمِينَ غَانِمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ كُنْ لِلْمُسْلِمينَ وَالمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ ؛ فَرِّجْ هَمَّهُم ، وَنَفِّسْ كَرْبَهُم ، وَأَقِلْ عَثْرَتَهُم وَتَوَلَّ بِنَفْسِكَ أَمْرَهُم. اللَّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ رَايَتَهُم ، وَاكْبِتْ عَدُوَّهُمْ.
text.tr: āllahhuma yaāḥayu yaā qayuwwmu yaāḥayu yaāqayuwwmu yaāḥayu yaā qayuwwmu āllahhuma aaẓilanniy fiy ẓili ʿarshika yawma lā ẓila iilāa ẓilukka. āllahhuma aaẓhir diynaka ʿalaā āldiyyni kulihhu walaw kariha ālmushrikuwna. āllahhuma yaā man yujiybu ālmuḍṭara iidhaā daʿaāhu wayakshifu ālsuwwʾa ākshifi ālsuwwʾa ʿan iikhwaāninaā ālausaāraā waālmasjuwniyna waālmuʿtaqaliyna āllahhuma āfkuk biquwattika aasrahum waājbur biraḥmatika kasrahum watawala biʿinaāyatika aamrahum warudahhum iilaā aahliyhim saālimiyna ghaānimiyna. āllahhuma kun lilmuslimyna waālmustaḍʿafiyna fiy kuli makaānin farijj hamahhum wanafiss karbahum waaaqil ʿathratahum watawala binafsika aamrahum. āllahhuma ārfaʿ raāyatahum waākbit ʿaduwahhum.
text.fr: Ô Allah, Ô Vivant, Ô Eternel, Ô Vivant, Ô Eternel, Ô Vivant, Ô Eternel ! Ô Allah, couvre-moi de l'ombre de Ton Trône le jour où il n'y aura d'autre ombre que la Tienne. Ô Allah, fais triompher Ta religion sur toute autre religion, n'en déplaise aux associateurs. Ô Allah, Toi qui réponds à l'oppressé quand il T'invoque et qui dissipes le mal, dissipe le mal qui touche nos frères prisonniers, détenus et internés. Ô Allah, par Ta puissance, délivre-les de leur captivité ; par Ta miséricorde, panse leurs blessures ; prends en charge leurs affaires par Ta sollicitude ; et ramène-les sains et saufs auprès de leurs familles, comblés de bienfaits. Ô Allah, sois avec les musulmans et les opprimés en tout lieu ; soulage leurs peines, dissipe leurs angoisses, relève leurs faux pas et prends Toi-même leurs affaires en main. Ô Allah, élève leur étendard et anéantis leur ennemi.
text.en: O Allah, O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining, O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining, O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining! O Allah, shade me in the shade of Your Throne on the Day when there is no shade but Your shade. O Allah, make Your religion prevail over all religions, even though the polytheists may dislike it. O Allah, You who answers the distressed when he calls upon You and removes harm, remove the harm afflicting our brothers who are prisoners, detainees, and internees. O Allah, by Your power, free them from captivity; by Your mercy, heal their wounds; take charge of their affairs with Your care; and return them to their families safe and victorious. O Allah, be with the Muslims and the oppressed everywhere; relieve their worries, dispel their distress, overlook their stumbles, and take their affairs into Your own hands. O Allah, raise their banner and suppress their enemy.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ وَحِّدْ صَفَّهُم ، وَاجْمَعْ كَلِمَتَهُم ، وَرُدَّهُم إِلَيْكَ رَدَّاً جَمِيلاً. اللَّهُمَّ لا أَبَرَّ بِهِم مِنْكَ ، وَلا أَرْحَمَ بِهِم مِنْكَ، وَلا أَرْأَفَ بِهِم مِنْكَ.. اللَّهُمَّ هُمْ مِنْكَ وَإِلَيكَ.. اللَّهُمَّ فَاجْعَلِ الدَّائِرَةَ لَهُم لا عَلَيهِم وَالنَّصْرَ حَلِيفَهُمْ.. يَا رَبِّ. اللَّهُمَّ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ سُئِلَ ، وَأَجْوَدَ مَنْ أَعْطَى ، وَأَكْرَمَ مَنْ عَفَا ، وَأَعْظَمَ مَنْ غَفَرَ ، وَأَعْدَلَ مَنْ حَكَمَ ، وَأَصْدَقَ مَنْ حَدَّثَ ، وَأَوْفَى مَنْ وَعَدَ ، وَأَبْصَرَ مَنْ رَاقَبَ ، وَأَسْرَعَ مَنْ حَاسَبَ ، وَأَرْحَمَ مَنْ عَاقَبَ ، وَأَحْسَنَ مَنْ خَلَقَ ، وَأَحْكَمَ مَنْ شَرَعَ ، وَأَحَقَّ مَنْ عُبِدَ ، وَأَوْلَى مَنْ دُعِيَ ، وَأَبَرَّ مَنْ أَجَابَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ المَسْأَلَةِ ، وَخَيرَ الدُّعَاءِ ، وَخَيرَ النَّجَاحِ ، وَخَيرَ العَمَلِ ، وَخَيرَ الثَّوَابِ ، وَخَيرَ الحَيَاةِ ، وَخَيرَ المَمَاتِ ، وَثَبِّتْنِي ، وَثَقِّلْ مَوَازِينِي ، وَحَقِّقْ إِيمَانِي ، وَارْفَعْ دَرَجَاتِي ، وَتَقَبَّلْ صَلاَتِي ، وَاغْفِرْ خَطِيئَتِي ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الدَّرَجَاتِ العُلَى مِنَ الجَنَّةِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فَوَاتِحَ الخَيرِ ، وَخَوَاتِـمَهُ ، وَجَوَامِعَهُ ، وَأَوَّلَهُ ، وَظَاهِرَهُ ، وَبَاطِنَهُ ، وَالدَّرَجَاتِ العُلَى مِنَ الجَنَّة آمِينَ.
text.tr: āllahhuma waḥidd ṣafahhum waājmaʿ kalimatahum warudahhum iilayka radaāāan jamiylāan. āllahhuma lā aabara bihim minka walā aarḥama bihim minka walā aaraafa bihim minka.. āllahhuma hum minka waiilayka.. āllahhuma faājʿali āldaāāiiraha lahum lā ʿalayhim waālnaṣṣra ḥaliyfahum.. yaā rabi. āllahhuma yaā khayra man suiila waaajwada man aaʿṭaā waaakrama man ʿafaā waaaʿẓama man ghafara waaaʿdala man ḥakama waaaṣdaqa man ḥadaththa waaawfaā man waʿada waaabṣara man raāqaba waaasraʿa man ḥaāsaba waaarḥama man ʿaāqaba waaaḥsana man khalaqa waaaḥkama man sharaʿa waaaḥaqa man ʿubida waaawlaā man duʿiya waaabara man aajaāba. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka khayra ālmasaalahi wakhayra ālduʿʿaāʾi wakhayra ālnajjaāḥi wakhayra ālʿamali wakhayra ālthawwaābi wakhayra ālḥayaāhi wakhayra ālmamaāti wathabittniy wathaqill mawaāziyniy waḥaqiqq iiymaāniy waārfaʿ darajaātiy wataqaball ṣalāatiy waāghfir khaṭiyiatiy waaasaaluka āldarrajaāti ālʿulaā mina āljanahhi. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka fawaātiḥa ālkhayri wakhawaātimahu wajawaāmiʿahu waaawallahu waẓaāhirahu wabaāṭinahu waāldarrajaāti ālʿulaā mina āljanahh āmiyna.
text.fr: Ô Allah, unifie leurs rangs, rassemble leurs paroles, et ramène-les à Toi par un beau retour. Ô Allah, nul n'est plus pieux envers eux que Toi, nul n'est plus miséricordieux envers eux que Toi, nul n'est plus compatissant envers eux que Toi. Ô Allah, ils viennent de Toi et retournent à Toi. Ô Allah, fais que le sort (funeste) soit pour eux contre leurs ennemis, et non l'inverse, et que la victoire soit leur alliée, ô Seigneur ! Ô Allah, Toi le Meilleur de ceux que l'on implore, le Plus Généreux de ceux qui donnent, le Plus Noble de ceux qui pardonnent, le Plus Grand de ceux qui absolvent, le Plus Juste de ceux qui jugent, le Plus Véridique de ceux qui parlent, le Plus Fidèle de ceux qui promettent, le Plus Clairvoyant de ceux qui observent, le Plus Prompt de ceux qui jugent, le Plus Miséricordieux de ceux qui punissent, le Plus Parfait de ceux qui créent, le Plus Sage de ceux qui légifèrent, le Plus Digne d'être adoré, le Premier à être invoqué, le Plus Bienfaisant de ceux qui répondent. Ô Allah, je Te demande le meilleur de ce que l'on demande, le meilleur de ce que l'on invoque, le meilleur de la réussite, le meilleur des œuvres, la meilleure des récompenses, la meilleure des vies, la meilleure des morts. Affermis-moi, alourdis ma balance, rends ma foi véritable, élève mes degrés, accepte ma prière, pardonne-moi mes fautes, et je Te demande les plus hauts degrés du Paradis. Ô Allah, je Te demande les prémices du bien, sa conclusion, ce qui le rassemble, son commencement, ce qui est apparent et ce qui est caché, ainsi que les plus hauts degrés du Paradis. Amen.
text.en: O Allah, unite their ranks, bring their words together, and bring them back to You in a beautiful return. O Allah, none is more pious towards them than You, none is more merciful to them than You, none is more compassionate to them than You. O Allah, they are from You and to You (they return). O Allah, let the (evil) circle be upon them against their enemies, and not the opposite, and make victory their ally, O Lord! O Allah, Best of those who are asked, Most Generous of those who give, Most Noble of those who pardon, Greatest of those who forgive, Most Just of those who judge, Most Truthful of those who speak, Most Faithful of those who promise, Most Insightful of those who watch, Quickest of those who call to account, Most Merciful of those who punish, Most Perfect of those who create, Wisest of those who legislate, Most Worthy of worship, Most Deserving to be invoked, Most Beneficent of those who respond. O Allah, I ask You for the best of requests, the best of supplications, the best of success, the best of deeds, the best of rewards, the best of life, and the best of death. Make me firm, weigh down my scales, make my faith true, raise my ranks, accept my prayer, forgive my mistakes, and I ask You for the highest ranks of Paradise. O Allah, I ask You for the beginnings of good, its endings, its comprehensive aspects, its first, its apparent and its hidden, and the highest ranks of Paradise. Amen.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا آتِي ، وَخَيْرَ مَا أَفْعَلُ ، وَخَيرَ مَا أَعْمَلُ ، وَخَيْرَ مَا بَطَنَ ، وَخَيْرَ مَا ظَهَرَ ، وَالدَّرَجَاتِ العُلَى مِنَ الجَنَّةِ آمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَرْفَعَ ذِكْرِي ، وَتَضَعَ وِزْرِيَ ، وَتُصْلِحَ أَمْرِيَ ، وَتُطَهِّرَ قَلـْبِيَ ، وَتُحَصِّنَ فَرْجِيَ ، وَتُنَوِّرَ قَلْبِيَ ، وَتَغْفِرَ لِي ذَنْبِيَ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الدَّرَجَاتِ العُلَى مِنَ الجَنَّةِ آمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُبَارِكَ فِي نَفْسِي ، وَفِي سَمْعِي ، وَفِي بَصَرِي ، وَفِي رُوحِي ، وَفِي خَلْقِي ، وَفِي خُلُقِي ، وَفِي أَهْلِي ، وَفِِي مَحْيَاي ، وَفِي مَمَاتِي ، وَفِي عَمَلِي ، فَتَقَبَّلْ حَسَنَاتِي ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الدَّرَجَاتِ العُلَى مِنَ الجَنَّةِ آمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الحَمْدُ كُلُّهُ ، اللَّهُمَّ لا قَابِضَ لِمَا بَسَطْتَ ، وَلا بَاسِطَ لِمَا قَبَضْتَ ، وَلا هَادِيَ لِمَنْ أَضْلَلْتَ وَلا مُضِلَّ لِمَنْ هَدَيْتَ ، وَلا مُعْطِي لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَلا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيتَ ، وَلا مُقَرِّبَ رَبِّ لِمَا بَاعَدْتَ ، وَلا مُبَاعِدَ لِمَا قَرَّبْتَ ، اللَّهُمَّ ابْسُطْ عَلَينَا مِنْ بَرَكَاتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ وَفَضْلِكَ وَرِزْقِكَ ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ النَّعِيمَ المُقِيمَ الَّذِي لا يَحُولُ وَلا يَـزُولُ ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ النَّعِيمَ يَوْمَ العَيْلَةِ وَالأَمْنِ يَوْمَ الخَوفِ ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَائِذٌ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَعْطَيْتَنَا وَشَرِّ مَا مَنَعْتَنَا. اللَّهُمَّ حَبِّبْ إِلَينَا الإِيمَانَ وَزَيِّنْهُ فِي قُلُوبِنَا وَكَرِّه إِلَيْنَا الكُفْرَ وَالفُسُوقَ وَالعِصْيانَ ، وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الرَّاشِدِينَ ، اللَّهُمَّ تَوَفَّنَا مُسْـلِمِينَ ، وَأَحْينَا مُسْلِمِينَ ، وَأَلْحِقْنَا بِالصَّالِحِينَ غَيرَ خَزَايَا وَلاَ مَفْتُونِينَ ، اللَّهُمَّ قَاتِلِ الكَفَرَةَ الَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ رُسُلَكَ ، وَيَصُدُّونَ عَنْ سَبِيلِكَ ، وَاجْعَلْ عَلَيهِم رِجْزَكَ وَعَذَابَكَ ، اللَّهُمَّ قَاتِلِ الكَفَرَةَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الكِتَابَ ، إِلَهَ الحَقِّ.. آمِينَ.
text.tr: āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka khayra maā ātiy wakhayra maā aafʿalu wakhayra maā aaʿmalu wakhayra maā baṭana wakhayra maā ẓahara waāldarrajaāti ālʿulaā mina āljanahhi āmiyna. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka aan tarfaʿa dhikriy wataḍaʿa wizriya watuṣliḥa aamriya watuṭahirra qalbiya watuḥaṣinna farjiya watunawirra qalbiya wataghfira liy dhanbiya waaasaaluka āldarrajaāti ālʿulaā mina āljanahhi āmiyna. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka aan tubaārika fiy nafsiy wafiy samʿiy wafiy baṣariy wafiy ruwḥiy wafiy khalqiy wafiy khuluqiy wafiy aahliy wafiiy maḥyaāy wafiy mamaātiy wafiy ʿamaliy fataqaball ḥasanaātiy waaasaaluka āldarrajaāti ālʿulaā mina āljanahhi āmiyna. āllahhuma laka ālḥamdu kuluhhu āllahhuma lā qaābiḍa limaā basaṭta walā baāsiṭa limaā qabaḍta walā haādiya liman aaḍlalta walā muḍila liman hadayta walā muʿṭiy limaā manaʿta walā maāniʿa limaā aaʿṭayta walā muqaribba rabi limaā baāʿadta walā mubaāʿida limaā qarabbta āllahhuma ābsuṭ ʿalaynaā min barakaātika waraḥmatika wafaḍlika warizqika āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka ālnaʿʿiyma ālmuqiyma āladhdhiy lā yaḥuwlu walā yazuwlu āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka ālnaʿʿiyma yawma ālʿaylahi waālaamni yawma ālkhawfi āllahhuma iiniyy ʿaāiidhun bika min shari maā aaʿṭaytanaā washari maā manaʿtanaā. āllahhuma ḥabibb iilaynaā āliiymaāna wazayinnhu fiy quluwbinaā wakarihh iilaynaā ālkufra waālfusuwqa waālʿiṣyāna waājʿalnaā mina ālraāāshidiyna āllahhuma tawafannaā muslimiyna waaaḥynaā muslimiyna waaalḥiqnaā biālṣaāāliḥiyna ghayra khazaāyaā walāa maftuwniyna āllahhuma qaātili ālkafaraha āladhdhiyna yukadhibbuwna rusulaka wayaṣuduwwna ʿan sabiylika waājʿal ʿalayhim rijzaka waʿadhaābaka āllahhuma qaātili ālkafaraha āladhdhiyna auwtuwā ālkitaāba iilaha ālḥaqi.. āmiyna.
text.fr: Ô Allah, je Te demande le bien de ce que je fais, le bien de ce que j'accomplis, le bien de ce que j'œuvre, le bien de ce qui est caché, le bien de ce qui est apparent, et les plus hauts degrés du Paradis. Amen. Ô Allah, je Te demande d'élever ma mention, d'alléger mon fardeau, de réformer mes affaires, de purifier mon cœur, de préserver ma chasteté, d'illuminer mon cœur, de me pardonner mes péchés, et je Te demande les plus hauts degrés du Paradis. Amen. Ô Allah, je Te demande de bénir mon être, mon ouïe, ma vue, mon esprit, ma création, mon caractère, ma famille, ma vie, ma mort et mon œuvre ; et d'accepter mes bonnes actions. Je Te demande les plus hauts degrés du Paradis. Amen. Ô Allah, à Toi toute la louange. Ô Allah, nul ne peut retenir ce que Tu étends, nul ne peut étendre ce que Tu retiens. Nul ne peut guider celui que Tu égares, nul ne peut égarer celui que Tu guides. Nul ne peut donner ce que Tu prives, nul ne peut priver de ce que Tu donnes. Nul ne peut rapprocher ce que Tu éloignes, nul ne peut éloigner ce que Tu rapproches. Ô Allah, répands sur nous Tes bénédictions, Ta miséricorde, Ta grâce et Ta subsistance. Ô Allah, je Te demande le bonheur permanent qui ne change ni ne disparaît. Ô Allah, je Te demande la félicité le jour du dénuement et la sécurité le jour de la peur. Ô Allah, je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal de ce que Tu nous as donné et contre le mal de ce que Tu nous as privé. Ô Allah, fais-nous aimer la foi et embellis-la dans nos cœurs, fais-nous détester la mécréance, la perversité et la désobéissance, et fais-nous partie des biens guidés. Ô Allah, fais-nous mourir musulmans, fais-nous vivre musulmans, et fais-nous rejoindre les vertueux, sans être couverts d'opprobre ni éprouvés. Ô Allah, combats les mécréants qui traitent Tes messagers de menteurs et qui détournent les gens de Ton chemin, et déverse sur eux Ton châtiment et Ton supplice. Ô Allah, combats les mécréants parmi les gens du Livre, ô Dieu de Vérité. Amen.
text.en: O Allah, I ask You for the good of what I do, the good of what I accomplish, the good of what I work towards, the good of what is hidden, the good of what is apparent, and the highest ranks of Paradise. Amen. O Allah, I ask You to raise my mention, lighten my burden, rectify my affairs, purify my heart, guard my chastity, illuminate my heart, forgive me my sins, and I ask You for the highest ranks of Paradise. Amen. O Allah, I ask You to bless my self, my hearing, my sight, my spirit, my physical form, my character, my family, my life, my death, and my deeds; and to accept my good deeds. I ask You for the highest ranks of Paradise. Amen. O Allah, to You belongs all praise. O Allah, none can withhold what You spread, and none can spread what You withhold. None can guide whom You lead astray, and none can lead astray whom You guide. None can give what You prevent, and none can prevent what You give. None can bring near what You distance, and none can distance what You bring near. O Allah, shower upon us Your blessings, Your mercy, Your grace, and Your provision. O Allah, I ask You for the everlasting bliss that neither changes nor perishes. O Allah, I ask You for felicity on the day of destitution and security on the day of fear. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what You have given us and from the evil of what You have prevented from us. O Allah, make faith beloved to us and adorn it in our hearts, make disbelief, wickedness, and disobedience hateful to us, and make us among the rightly guided. O Allah, cause us to die as Muslims, cause us to live as Muslims, and join us with the righteous, without disgrace or trial. O Allah, fight the disbelievers who deny Your messengers and turn people away from Your path, and pour upon them Your punishment and torment. O Allah, fight the disbelievers among the People of the Book, O God of Truth. Amen.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الغَيبِ ، وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الخَلْقِ ؛ أَحْيِنِي مَا عَلِمْتَ الحَيَاةَ خَيْراً لِي ، وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا عَلِمْتَ الوَفَاةَ خَيْراً لِي ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَشْيَتَكَ فِي الغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ كَلِمَةَ الحَقِّ فِي الرِّضَا وَالغَضَبِ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ القَصْدَ فِي الغِنَى وَالفَقْرِ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ نَعِيماً لا يَنْفَدُ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ قُرَّةَ عَيْنٍ لا تَنْقَطُعُ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ الرِّضَا بَعْدَ القَضَاءِ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ بَرْدَ العَيْشِ بَعْدَ المَوْتِ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ لَذَّةَ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِكَ ، وَالشَّوْقَ إِلَى لِقَائِكَ ، فِي غَيْرِ ضَرَّاءَ مُضِرَّةَ وَلا فِتْنَةً مُضِلَّةَ ، اللَّهُمَّ زَيِّنَّا بِزِينَةِ الإِيمَانِ ، وَاجْعَلْنَا هُدَاةً مُهْتَدِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِعْلَ الخَيْرَاتِ ، وَتَرْكَ المُنْكَرَاتِ ، وَحُبَّ المَسَاكِينَ ، وَأَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي وَتَرْحَمَنِي ، وَإذَا أَرَدْتَ فِتْنَةَ قَومٍ فَتَوَفَّنِي غَيْرَ مَفْتُونٍ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ ، وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبّـُكَ ، وَحُبَّ كل عَمَلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَى حُبِّـكَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنَ الخَيْرِ كُلِّهُ ؛ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ الشَّرِّ كُلِّهُ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ محمد ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا اسْتَعَاذَ بِكَ مِنْهُ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ محمد. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الجَنَّة ، وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ كُلَّ قَضَاءٍ قَضَيْتَهُ لِي خَيْراً.
text.tr: āllahhuma biʿilmika ālghaybi waqudratika ʿalaā ālkhalqi aaḥyiniy maā ʿalimta ālḥayaāha khayrāan liy watawafanniy iidhaā ʿalimta ālwafaāha khayrāan liy āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka khashyataka fiy ālghaybi waālshahhaādahi waaasaaluka kalimaha ālḥaqi fiy ālriḍḍaā waālghaḍabi waaasaaluka ālqaṣda fiy ālghinaā waālfaqri waaasaaluka naʿiymāan lā yanfadu waaasaaluka qurahha ʿaynin lā tanqaṭuʿu waaasaaluka ālriḍḍaā baʿda ālqaḍaāʾi waaasaaluka barda ālʿayshi baʿda ālmawti waaasaaluka ladhahha ālnaẓẓari iilaā wajhika waālshawwqa iilaā liqaāiika fiy ghayri ḍaraāāʾa muḍirahha walā fitnahan muḍilahha āllahhuma zayinnaāā biziynahi āliiymaāni waājʿalnaā hudaāhan muhtadiyna. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka fiʿla ālkhayraāti watarka ālmunkaraāti waḥuba ālmasaākiyna waaan taghfira liy watarḥamaniy waidhaā aaradta fitnaha qawmin fatawafanniy ghayra maftuwnin waaasaaluka ḥubakka waḥuba man yuḥibukka waḥuba kl ʿamalin yuqaribbuniy iilaā ḥubikka. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka mina ālkhayri kulihhu ʿaājilihi waājilihi maā ʿalimtu minhu wamaā lam aaʿlam waaaʿuwdhu bika min ālsharri kulihhu ʿaājilihi waājilihi maā ʿalimtu minhu wamaā lam aaʿlam. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka min khayri maā saaalaka ʿabduka wanabiyukka mḥmd waaaʿuwdhu bika min shari maā āstaʿaādha bika minhu ʿabduka wanabiyukka mḥmd. āllahhuma iiniyy aasaaluka āljanahh wamaā qarabba iilayhaā min qawlin aaw ʿamalin waaaʿuwdhu bika mina ālnaāāri wamaā qarabba iilayhaā min qawlin aaw ʿamalin waaasaaluka aan tajʿala kula qaḍaāʾin qaḍaytahu liy khayrāan.
text.fr: Ô Allah, par Ta connaissance de l'invisible et Ta puissance sur la création, fais-moi vivre tant que Tu sais que la vie est meilleure pour moi, et fais-moi mourir quand Tu sais que la mort est meilleure pour moi. Ô Allah, je Te demande de Te craindre dans l'intime et en public, je Te demande la parole de vérité dans la satisfaction et la colère, je Te demande la modération dans la richesse et la pauvreté, je Te demande un bonheur qui ne s'épuise pas, une joie des yeux qui ne cesse jamais, la satisfaction après le décret (divin), la fraîcheur de la vie après la mort, la délectation à contempler Ton Visage, et le désir ardent de Te rencontrer, sans qu'aucune adversité nuisible ni tentation égarante ne m'atteigne. Ô Allah, pare-nous de la parure de la foi, et fais de nous des guides bien guidés. Ô Allah, je Te demande d'accomplir les bonnes actions, de délaisser les mauvaises, d'aimer les pauvres, de me pardonner et de me faire miséricorde. Et si Tu veux éprouver un peuple, fais-moi mourir sans être éprouvé. Je Te demande Ton amour, l'amour de ceux qui T'aiment, et l'amour de toute œuvre qui me rapproche de Ton amour. Ô Allah, je Te demande tout le bien, immédiat et futur, ce que j'en connais et ce que j'en ignore. Je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre tout le mal, immédiat et futur, ce que j'en connais et ce que j'en ignore. Ô Allah, je Te demande le bien que Ton serviteur et Prophète Mohammed (que la prière et le salut d'Allah soient sur lui) T'a demandé, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre le mal contre lequel Ton serviteur et Prophète Mohammed a cherché refuge. Ô Allah, je Te demande le Paradis et ce qui en rapproche en paroles et en actions, et je cherche refuge auprès de Toi contre l'Enfer et ce qui en rapproche en paroles et en actions. Et je Te demande de faire que tout décret que Tu rends à mon sujet soit pour mon bien.
text.en: O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive so long as You know life is good for me, and cause me to die when You know death is good for me. O Allah, I ask You for fear of You in private and in public, I ask You for the word of truth in times of pleasure and anger, I ask You for moderation in wealth and poverty, I ask You for everlasting bliss, for never-ending joy of the eyes, for acceptance after Your decree, for a pleasant life after death, for the delight of gazing upon Your Face, and for the longing to meet You, without experiencing any harmful adversity or misleading trial. O Allah, adorn us with the adornment of faith, and make us guided guides. O Allah, I ask You to do good deeds, to abandon evil deeds, to love the poor, to forgive me and have mercy on me. And if You intend to test a people, then take me to You without being tested. I ask You for Your love, the love of those who love You, and the love of every deed that brings me closer to Your love. O Allah, I ask You for all that is good, immediate and future, what I know of it and what I do not know. I seek refuge in You from all that is evil, immediate and future, what I know of it and what I do not know. O Allah, I ask You for the good that Your servant and Prophet Muhammad (peace and blessings be upon him) asked of You, and I seek refuge in You from the evil from which Your servant and Prophet Muhammad sought refuge. O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and for words and deeds that bring one closer to it, and I seek refuge in You from Hellfire and from words and deeds that bring one closer to it. And I ask You to make every decree You decree concerning me be good for me.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ مَا تَحُولُ بِهِ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ مَعَاصِيكَ ، وَمِنْ طَاعَتِكَ مَا تُبَلِّغْنَا بِهِ جَنَّتَكَ ، وَمِنَ اليَقِينِ مَا تُهَوِّنُ بِهِ عَلَيْنَا مَصَائِبَ الدُّنْيَا ، اللَّهُمَّ مَتِّعْنَا بِأَسْمَاعِنَا ، وَأَبْصَارِنَا ، وَقُوَّاتِنَا مَا أَحْيَيْتَنَا ، وَاجْعَلْهُ الوَارِثَ مِنَّا ، وَاجْعَلْ ثَأْرَنَا عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنَا ، وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى مَنْ عَادَانَا ، وَلا تَجْعَلْ مُصِيبَتَنَا فِي دِينِنَا وَلا تَجْعَلْ الدُّنْيَا أَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا ، وَلا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنَا ، وَلا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا مَنْ لا يَرْحَمْنَا. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْألُكَ مُوجِبَاتِ رَحْمَتِكَ ، وَعَزَائِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ ، وَالسَّلامَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ إثْمٍ ، وَالغَنِيمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بِرِّ ، وَالفَوْزَ بِالجَنَّةِ ، وَالنَّجَاةَ مِنَ النَّارِ. اللَّهُمَّ لا تَدَعْ لَنَا ذَنْبًا إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ ، وَلا هَمًّا إِلاَّ فَرَّجْتَهُ ، وَلا دَيْنًا إِلاَّ قَضَيْتَهُ ، وَلا مَرِيضاً إِلاَّ شَفَيْتَهُ ، وَلا مُبْتَلَى إِلاَّ عَافَيْتَهُ ، وَلا ضَالاً إِلاَّ هَدَيْتَهُ ، وَلا غَائِباً إِلاَّ رَدَدْتَهُ ، وَلا مَظْلُوماً إِلاَّ نَصَرْتَهُ ، وَلا أَسِيراً إِلاَّ فَكَكْتَهُ ، وَلا مَيِّتاً إِلاَّ رَحِمْتَهُ ، وَلا حَاجَةً لَنَا فِيهَا صَلاحٌ وَلَكَ فِيهَا رِضاً إِلاَّ قَضَيْتَهَا وَيَسَّرْتَهَا بِفَضْلِكَ يَا أَكْرَمَ الأَكْرَمِينَ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ أَعِنِّي وَلا تُعِنْ عَلَيَّ ، وَانْصُرْنِي وَلا تَنْصُرْ عَلَيَّ ، وَامْكُرْ لِي وَلا تَمْكُرْ عَلَيَّ ، وَاهْدِنِي وَيَسِّرِ الهُدَى إِلَيَّ ، وَانْصُرْنِي عَلَى مَنْ بَغَى عَلَيَّ. اللَّهُمَّ رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي لَكَ شَكَّاراً ، لَكَ ذَكَّاراً ، لَكَ رَهَّاباً ، لَكَ مِطْـوَاعاً ، إِلَيْكَ مُخْبِتاً أَوَّاهاً مُنِيباً ، رَبِّ تَقَبَّلْ تَوْبَتِي ، وَاغْسِلْ حَوْبَتِي ، وَأَجِبْ دَعْوَتِي ، وَثَبِّتْ حُجَّتِي ، وَاهْدِ قَلْبِي ، وَسَدِّدْ لِسَانِي ، وَاسْلُلْ سَخِيمَةَ قَلْبِي.
text.tr: āllahhuma āqsim lanaā min khashyatika maā taḥuwlu bihi baynanaā wabayna maʿaāṣiyka wamin ṭaāʿatika maā tubalighghnaā bihi janattaka wamina ālyaqiyni maā tuhawinnu bihi ʿalaynaā maṣaāiiba āldunnyaā āllahhuma matiʿʿnaā biaasmaāʿinaā waaabṣaārinaā waquwaāātinaā maā aaḥyaytanaā waājʿalhu ālwaāritha minaāā waājʿal thaaranaā ʿalaā man ẓalamanaā waānṣurnaā ʿalaā man ʿaādaānaā walā tajʿal muṣiybatanaā fiy diyninaā walā tajʿal āldunnyaā aakbara haminnaā walā mablagha ʿilminaā walā tusaliṭṭ ʿalaynaā man lā yarḥamnaā. āllahhuma iinaāā nasaluka muwjibaāti raḥmatika waʿazaāiima maghfiratika waālsallāmaha min kuli ithmin waālghaniymaha min kuli biri waālfawza biāljanahhi waālnajjaāha mina ālnaāāri. āllahhuma lā tadaʿ lanaā dhanbanā iilāa ghafartahu walā hamanāā iilāa farajjtahu walā daynanā iilāa qaḍaytahu walā mariyḍāan iilāa shafaytahu walā mubtalaā iilāa ʿaāfaytahu walā ḍaālāan iilāa hadaytahu walā ghaāiibāan iilāa radadtahu walā maẓluwmāan iilāa naṣartahu walā aasiyrāan iilāa fakaktahu walā mayittāan iilāa raḥimtahu walā ḥaājahan lanaā fiyhaā ṣalāḥun walaka fiyhaā riḍāan iilāa qaḍaytahaā wayasarrtahaā bifaḍlika yaā aakrama ālaakramiyna. āllahhuma rabi aaʿiniyy walā tuʿin ʿalaya waānṣurniy walā tanṣur ʿalaya waāmkur liy walā tamkur ʿalaya waāhdiniy wayasirri ālhudaā iilaya waānṣurniy ʿalaā man baghaā ʿalaya. āllahhuma rabi ājʿalniy laka shakaāārāan laka dhakaāārāan laka rahaāābāan laka miṭwaāʿāan iilayka mukhbitāan aawaāāhāan muniybāan rabi taqaball tawbatiy waāghsil ḥawbatiy waaajib daʿwatiy wathabitt ḥujattiy waāhdi qalbiy wasadidd lisaāniy waāslul sakhiymaha qalbiy.
text.fr: Ô Allah, accorde-nous une part de Ta crainte qui nous sépare de Tes désobéissances, une part de Ton obéissance qui nous mène à Ton Paradis, et une part de certitude qui rende les malheurs du monde supportables à nos yeux. Ô Allah, fais-nous profiter de nos ouïes, de nos vues et de nos forces tant que Tu nous maintiens en vie, et fais que ces facultés soient ce que nous léguons (elles nous survivent dans nos œuvres pieuses). Fais que notre vengeance retombe sur ceux qui nous ont opprimés, accorde-nous la victoire sur nos ennemis, ne fais pas que notre malheur frappe notre religion, ne fais pas de ce monde notre principal souci ni le summum de notre science, et ne donne pas pouvoir sur nous à quelqu'un qui n'aura pas pitié de nous. Ô Allah, nous Te demandons ce qui entraîne Ta miséricorde, ce qui détermine Ton pardon, la préservation de tout péché, le butin de toute œuvre pie, le gain du Paradis et la délivrance du Feu. Ô Allah, ne nous laisse aucun péché sans le pardonner, aucune angoisse sans la dissiper, aucune dette sans l'acquitter, aucun malade sans le guérir, aucun éprouvé sans le rétablir, aucun égaré sans le guider, aucun absent sans le ramener, aucun opprimé sans le secourir, aucun prisonnier sans le libérer, aucun mort sans lui accorder Ta miséricorde, et aucun besoin pour nous qui soit une source de bien et où Tu trouves Ta satisfaction, sans l'exaucer et le faciliter par Ta grâce, ô le Plus Généreux des généreux. Ô Allah, mon Seigneur, aide-moi et ne m'abandonne pas, accorde-moi la victoire et ne donne pas à d'autres la victoire sur moi, ruse en ma faveur et non contre moi, guide-moi et facilite-moi l'accès à la guidance, donne-moi la victoire sur ceux qui me tyrannisent. Ô Allah, mon Seigneur, fais de moi quelqu'un qui Te rend grâce, qui T'invoque beaucoup, qui Te craint, qui T'obéit volontiers, qui s'humilie devant Toi, qui implore (Ton pardon) et qui revient sans cesse vers Toi. Seigneur, accepte mon repentir, lave-moi de mes fautes, exauce mon invocation, affermis mon argument, guide mon cœur, redresse ma langue, et extirpe toute rancune de mon cœur.
text.en: O Allah, apportion to us of Your fear that which will stand between us and acts of disobedience to You, of Your obedience that which will bring us to Your Paradise, and of certainty that which will make the calamities of this world easy for us. O Allah, let us benefit from our hearing, our sight, and our strength as long as You keep us alive, and make these faculties our inheritors (may they outlast us in pious deeds). Let our vengeance be upon those who have wronged us, grant us victory over our enemies, do not let our affliction be in our religion, do not make this world our greatest concern nor the limit of our knowledge, and do not give power over us to one who will not have mercy on us. O Allah, we ask You for the means to Your mercy, the decisive factors of Your forgiveness, safety from every sin, the spoils of every righteous deed, attainment of Paradise, and deliverance from the Fire. O Allah, do not leave any sin of ours without forgiving it, any anxiety without relieving it, any debt without settling it, any sick person without healing them, any afflicted person without restoring them, anyone astray without guiding them, anyone absent without returning them, any oppressed person without aiding them, any captive without freeing them, any deceased person without having mercy on them, and any need of ours that is good and pleasing to You without fulfilling it and making it easy by Your grace, O Most Generous of the generous. O Allah, my Lord, help me and do not help others against me, grant me victory and do not grant victory over me, plan for me and do not plan against me, guide me and make guidance easy for me, and grant me victory over those who transgress against me. O Allah, my Lord, make me one who thanks You, who remembers You much, who fears You, who is obedient to You, who humbles himself before You, who implores (Your forgiveness), and who repeatedly turns back to You. My Lord, accept my repentance, wash away my sins, answer my supplication, make firm my proof, guide my heart, make my tongue speak rightly, and remove rancor from my heart.

text.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْألكَ يُسْراً لَيْسَ بَعْدَهُ عُسْرٌ ، وَغِنىً لَيْسَ بَعْدَهُ فَقْرٌ ، وَأَمْناً لَيْسَ بَعْدَهُ خَوْفٌ ، وَسَعَادَةً لَيْسَ بَعْدَهَا شَقَاءٌ. اللَّهُمَّ ألِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا ، وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِـنَا ، وَاهْدِنَا سُبُلَ السَّلامِ ، وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ ، وَجَنِّبْنَا الفَوَاحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ ، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي أَسْمَاعِـنَا ، وَأَبْصَارِنَا ، وَقُلُوبِنَا ، وَأَزْوَاجِـنَا ، وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا ، وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ ، وَاجْعَلْنَا شَاكِرِينَ لِنِعَمِكَ مُثْنِينَ بِهَا عَلَيْكَ قَابِلِينَ لَهَا وَأَتْمِمْهَا عَلَيْنَا. اللَّهُمَّ يَا مُقَلِّبَ القُلُوبِ وَالأَبْصَارِ ، ثَبِّتْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى طَاعَتِكَ ، وَلا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا ، ولا تَفْتِنَّا فِي دِينِنَا ، وَاجْعَلْ يَوْمَنَا خَيْراً مِنْ أَمْسِنَا ، وَاجْعَلْ غَدَنَا خَيْراً مِنْ يَوْمـِنَا ، وَاجْعَلْ خَيْرَ أَعْمَارِنَا أَوَاخِرَهَا ، وَخَيْرَ أَعْمَالِنَا خَوَاتِيمَهَا ، وَخَيْرَ أَيَّامِنَا يَوْمَ نَلْقَاكَ وَأَنْتَ رَاضٍ عَنَّا. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الَّذِي خَلَقْتَنِي فَأَنْتَ تَهْدِينِ ، وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي تُطْعِمُنِي وَتَسْقِينِ ، وَإذَا مَرِضْتُ فَأَنْتَ تَشْفِينِ ، وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي تُمِيتُنِي ثُمَّ تُحْـيِينِ ، وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي أَطْمَعُ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ لِي خَطِيئَتِي يَوْمَ الدِّينِ ، رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْماً وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ ، وَاجْعَلْ لِي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الآخِرِينَ ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ ، وَاغْفِرْ لآبَائِنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا مِنَ المُسْلِمِينَ وَلا تُخْزِنِي يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ ، يَوْمَ لا يَنْفَعُ مَالٌ وَلا بَنُونَ ، إِلاَّ مَنْ أَتَى اللهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ. اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي بِالإسْلاَمِ قَائِماً ، وَاحْفَظْنِي بِالإِسْلاَمِ قَاعِداً ، وَاحْفَظْنِي بِالإِسْلامِ رَاقِداً ، وَلاَ تُشْمِتْ بِي عَدُوّاً وَلا حَاسِداً.
